entry.title: External display for IW33
entry.content:
• Good Evening All

I have a question, is it possible to to show a work order number and description from iw33 to an external display in maintenence department,  basically when production makes a PM I would like SAP to wright some data like order number , time , comments ,ext to a html page and then the monitor in maintenence can read that html page.

Kinda new to SAP so don't know if it's possible

 

Thanks for your reply in advance

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Yes! Add the briljant codejam knowledge of @qmacro using CLI to spin up BTP services even faster using API's, the 5 minutes did it! 😀🐶

entry.title: What is planned for the 2411 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing?
entry.content:
The 2411 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing is planned to be deployed to BTP customer tenants on October 23, 2024.

 

This blog covers the following planned innovations:

  • Pricing service – Price Agreements
  • Pricing service – Manage Stored Documents
  • Pricing service – Graduated Interval Scales Factor
  • Pricing service – Proper Returning of Used Currency Exchange Rates
  • Variant Configuration Service – Change the Source of a Configuration
  • Extension Concept – Pass the Variant Factors to Extension Implementations
  • Administration – Alerts in Case of High Number of Deltas
  • Administration – Rate Limits for Calls to the Administration Service
  • Administration – Improved Variant Table Load for Knowledge Bases
  • Administration – New Fields for the Display of Condition Records

 

It also includes a call to act regarding the following potentially incompatible changes:

  • Administration – Rate Limits for Calls to the Administration Service

 

Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

 

Disclaimer

The information in this presentation is confidential and proprietary to SAP and may not be disclosed without the permission of SAP.
Except for your obligation to protect confidential information, this presentation is not subject to your license agreement or any other service or subscription agreement with SAP. SAP has no obligation to pursue any course of business outlined in this presentation or any related document, or to develop or release any functionality mentioned therein.

This presentation, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. The information in this presentation is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.  This presentation is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This presentation is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates,
and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.

 

Pricing service – Price Agreements

SAP CPQ plans to support a process called tier pricing, in which the sales agent negotiates certain price scales with the end customer during the quotation process. The sales agent creates a quote and adds items. The price is determined as defined by the pricing procedure using the Pricing service. The sales agent can then negotiate and overwrite scales per price condition per item, which usually means that a lower price per amount is applied for higher item quantities. Those thresholds, where for a certain higher item quantity a lower price is applied, are called tiers. The scales/tiers maintained in SAP CPQ for a quote item will overrule the prices and scales maintained for the product in SAP S/4HANA.

For that, we will introduce new Pricing service endpoints to create, change, read, and delete so-called price agreements. When the calling application passes a price agreement for an item with the negotiated scales for a certain condition type, the Pricing service will use that data to determine the price instead of using what was maintained in the condition record.

The following call creates a new price agreement for the item {itemId} of the pricing document {documentId}:

POST /api/v1/pricing/documents/{documentId}/items/{itemId}/priceAgreements

 

{
  "priceAgreements": [
    {
      "calculationType": "C",
      "conditionTypeId": "PR00",
      "rate": {
        "unit": "EUR",
        "value": "4.99"
      },
      "rateQuantity": {
        "unit": "PCE",
        "value": 1
      },
      "scale": {
        "levels": [
          {
            "scaleRate": {
              "unit": "EUR",
              "value": "4.99"
            },
            "scaleValue": "1.000"
          },
          {
            "scaleRate": {
              "unit": "EUR",
              "value": "3.99"
            },
            "scaleValue": "10.000"
          },
          {
            "scaleRate": {
              "unit": "EUR",
              "value": "2.99"
            },
            "scaleValue": "20.000"
          }
        ],
        "scaleType": "A",
        "scaleUnit": "PCE"
      },
      "validity": {
        "endDate": "2018-12-31",
        "startDate": "2018-01-01"
      }
    }
  ]
}

 

The example above overwrites the price condition PR00. It establishes two tiers:

Tier 1: From item quantity 1 to 9 pieces: 4,99€ per 1 piece (PCE)
Tier 2: For item quantity 10 and above: 3,99€ per 1 piece (PCE)

For a successful price agreement creation, the endpoint returns a price agreement id.

You can only have one price agreement per condition type per item.

You can use the price agreement id with the GET, PATCH, and DELETE endpoints to read, overwrite, or delete it again.

We will not only support this with document pricing but will also enhance the stateless pricing API analogously to allow passing such price agreements at the item level.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide with the November release.

The planned process in SAP CPQ will end with the acceptance of the quote, which will write the negotiated scales into a new condition table in SAP S/4HANA before the contract in SAP S/4HANA is created. With that, it is ensured that those negotiated prices will be applied to the item in the context of this contract.

 

Pricing Service – Manage Stored Documents

When creating a new pricing document with the endpoint POST /documents, it will be possible to specify the owner or the source of the document. The source application, the source type; for example, quote, and the source id; for example, the quote’s transaction number, can be passed and stored with the pricing document.

Example call:

POST /documents

 

{
  "documentCurrencyUnit": "EUR",
  "exchangeRateDate": "2024-09-17",
  "exchangeRateType": "M",
  "localCurrencyUnit": "USD",
  "pricingProcedureId": "ZPRC03",
  "source": {
    "application": "cpq",
    "type": "quote"
    "id": "49709821",
  }
}

 

The source of a pricing document can be specified in the same way when creating a new document as a copy through endpoint POST /documents/{documentId}/copy.

Action:

  • It is recommended to specify the source of the pricing document, so that it can later be used to identify the owner of the document and to judge if it can be deleted again.

The new endpoint GET /documents will be introduced to return a list of stored pricing documents. The API will offer different filter capabilities, for example, filtering based on the source of the document.

A stored pricing document can be read with endpoint GET /documents/{documentId}.

A stored document can be deleted with endpoint DELETE /documents/{documentId}.

More information will be published in the API Definition and the Development Guide with the November release.

 

Pricing service – Graduated Interval Scales Factor

When doing Pricing with Graduated Scales, a factor per scale level is calculated and applied to calculate the condition value from the condition rate. This factor used to overwrite the value of the duration factor in the response field conditions-durationFactor. This loss of information will be corrected by returning the factor separately in the response field conditions-graduatedScaleFactor.

More information will be published in the API Definition and the Development Guide with the November release.

 

Pricing service – Proper Returning of Used Currency Exchange Rates

Condition rates are either converted directly from the condition record currency to the document currency; or they are converted through triangular conversion; first, from the condition record currency to the local currency and then to the document currency. The condition value is always returned in the document currency.

With a request parameter for stateless pricing and document pricing, it is possible to get the used currency conversion rates returned. This allows the calling application to do its own calculations in the same way.

In the currency conversion response: items->currencyConversions->localCurrencyToDocumentCurrency, the returned exchange rate used to be for converting document currency to the local currency instead of the local currency to the document currency. This issue will be corrected. 

 

Variant Configuration Service – Change the Source of a Configuration

When creating a new configuration with the endpoint POST /configurations, the owner or the source of the configuration can be specified. The source application, the source type; for example, quote item, and the source id; for example, the item number 10, can be passed and are stored with the configuration.

The source information can be used as filter criteria in the APIs to manage stored configurations.

With the November release, the enhanced endpoint PATCH /configurations will allow overwriting the source of a configuration in addition to the context:

No partial updates are possible, it is required to provide all the source information: application, type, and id.

Use case: In SAP Commerce Cloud, a user first chooses a product from the product catalog and starts the configuration. Then, the configuration is added to the cart. Finally, the cart is converted into an order. During that process the owner of the configuration changes from the product to the cart item, and finally, to the order item.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide with the November release.

 

Extension Concept – Pass the Variant Factors to Extension Implementations

Variant condition keys are passed to pricing extension implementations using the corresponding pricing attribute, but the variant factors returned by the Variant Configuration service with each key are currently missing.

Remote and local pricing extension interfaces will be enhanced with the optional item input structure variantKeyFactors, allowing the pricing engine to pass the list of all variant keys with the pricing factors when calling a custom pricing routine:

More information will be published in the API Definition and the Extension Guide with the November release.

 

Administration – Alerts in Case of High Number of Deltas

When there is a very high number of deltas that is being replicated, you might want to get notified to check if it would be faster to do a full reload as the performance of the reload is much better compared to that of the delta replication.

The Alert Notification service and SAP Cloud ALM will be used to send notifications about such big numbers of pending deltas.

It will be possible to overwrite the threshold of pending deltas that will trigger the alert:

 

Only applicable for replications based on SAP HANA smart data integration. 

More information will be published in the Administration Guide with the November release.

 

Administration – Rate Limits for Calls to the Administration Service

A rate limit of 5 concurrent API calls per tenant and per server instance will be introduced. The Administration service will run with at least two server instances per region.

The following error message will be returned if the rate limit is reached:
HTTP429 Error: Too many concurrent calls

Please try to reduce the number of concurrent calls and try again.

Additionally, the following limits will apply too:

  • Up to 20 extension archives can be uploaded
  • The last upload must be older than 5 minutes
  • The maximum archive file size is 20 MB
  • There shall be less than 3000 files in an archive
  • A file compressed in the archive must not exceed 30 MB
  • The uncompressed size of all files of the archive must not exceed 100 MB 

More information will be published in the API Definition and the Development Guide with the November release.

 

Administration – Improved variant table load for knowledge bases

The replication mechanism will be improved for variant tables of knowledge bases when reloading: Only variant tables of changed knowledge bases will be loaded.

There will be a new option to enforce a full reload, for example, after a system refresh:

More information will be published in the Administration Guide with the November release.

 

Administration – New Fields for the Display of Condition Records

New fields will be added for the display of condition records:

  • Deletion indicator (KONP-LOEVM_KO): Helps to understand why a condition record is skipped.
  • Exclusion indicator (KONP-KZNEP): Helps to understand why a condition type was skipped.

More information will be published in the Administration Guide with the November release.

 

 

With that, you have a good overview of what innovations are planned for the November release. Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

entry.title: BODS Connectivity with Anaplan Data Hub

Hi

We have a requirement to Extract and load data to Anaplan Data Hub, Can we use BODS to extract/load the data directly using Anaplan API's, or do we need any other integrators in between?

entry.title: Re: Configuring Guided Steps in SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: Onboarding Email Templates editor is limited?
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

Indeed, it is the case since a few months now.

What we do : copy your text in word document, then paste it in your email with formatting.

Disadvantage of this is that the formatting can be heavy in characters and that you easily reach the limit of the content of the email.

Kind regards,

Marie

entry.title: How to create custom cubes, queries and measurements using SAP key user tools
entry.content:
SAP key user tools can support end user to create their own cubes, queries and custom measurements. In this blog, we use sales analytics CDS View as example.

Needed Roles:

  • SAP_BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST(Create Customizing Queries)
  • SAP_BR_SALES_MANAGER(Show sales and billing analytics data)

Create Custom Cube

1. Open app "Custom CDS Views" and click "Create".

 2. Input view name and select the scenario Analytical Cube.

 3. Add the primary data source, e.g., I_BillingDocumentCube

 4. If primary data source cannot cover all required value, you can add associate data source. Click "Add" -> "Associated Data Source".

 5. Select associated data source.

 6. Click the button "Join Condition" to add join condition if required.

 

7. Add join condition. E.g., Billingdocument and billingdocumentitem 

 

8. You can define Parameter Value if parameter is required. After setting is done, check the color from red to blue. Go to tap Elements, click "Add"->"Elements".

 

9. Add all the elements what we need in the report.

 10. Go to tap "Elements Properties". During searching each fields, check the selections are correct.

 

11. Go to tap "Filter", if you need some filter options, e.g., sales organization.

 

12. All are done, click "Check" and "Preview data".

 

13. Click button "Publish". Custom CDS View is completed.

 14. Click tap "Next Steps" and choose button "Custom Analytical Queries".

 

Create Custom Query based on created custom cube

15. Click "New" to create new query. (App "Custom Analytical Queries"). Add Query Name and Data Source which is created in the last, then click "OK".

 

16. Filed selection(For example, Tax Amount, Net Value, Sakes Volume Qty, Credit Memos Qty, Sales Volume, Credit Memos, Billing Document etc.,)

Create Custom Measurements

 17. In section "Display", click "Add"->"Add Converted Measure". If the measurements only have transaction currencies, this function can convert the transaction currency to a fixed currency or be an external input.

 18. Input Label and Name. Select type "Currency Conversion". Then click "OK".

 19. Select value help of Target Currency.

 20. You can select a fixed value.

 21. You can also select User Input Filters.

 22. Add Calculated Measure. This function can enable you design your own measurement using existing fields/measurements.

 23. Input Expression. For example, Amount with Tax = "Net Value" - "Tax Amount", Net Quantity = "Sales Volume Qty" - "Credit Memos Qty".

 24. In section "Filters", set some filters on dimension if necessary. Preview the content of custom analytical query by click "Preview" button, and you can check the preview data if it is as expected.

 

25. Input exchange rate type and display currency, then click Go. This query will be previewed in Web Dynpro framework.

 

26. Click back, page will be back to your custom query. Save draft and click "Publish".

 27. To save the custom analytical report to your homepage of launchpad, click "Preview" and you can click "Save as Tile".

 

Save report as a Tile

28. Input Tile and select a Page. Then you can open this query from your launchpad.

 29. If you want to share the custom analytical report to others which means the report can be visible and accessed by authorized users. Open app "View Browser".

 30.Select the custom analytical query which you created, and click "Create Application". After the application is created, you can see the Application ID available to the custom analytical query.

 31. Enter Title and Subtitle, then click "OK".

 

32. Application is created.

 

33. Click the application ID  link, then a popup dialog will display. Click "View in Catalog" to navigate to app "Custom Catalog Extensions".

 

34. Add custom analytical query to business catalogs. Click "Add"

 

 35. Search the business catalog.

 36. Select the business catalogs which you want to  publish, click "Publish"

 37. When the status is published, the custom analytical report should be available to the users who have been assigned the business catalogs.

 

38. In app finder, the custom analytical report is displayed in assigned business catalogs. You can add it to pages.

 39. You can open your custom analytical report from your launchpad.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding Email Templates editor is limited?
entry.content: Hi Marie,

entry.title: Re: sm59 Connection Test SLD_NUC error

entry.title: Re: WCM Control Key
entry.content: Thanks very much Matjaz for your valuable information .

entry.title: "Email Draft Version" to limited access rights for sensitive or undisclosed information
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a use case and I hope that someone can help me or has ideas on how to implement it.

Requirement: In addition to newsletters, we also use the SMC to send discrete information that must be kept confidential until a certain date. This means that only a certain group of people can have access to this email.

In our old mailing solution there was a "draft" feature that restricted the visibility of the mailing (PR, announcement, etc.) (in the content studio) so that only certain people or the editor could see it.

We are now trying to implement something similar in the SMC, but it is important that we have 1 marketing area (for subscriptions etc.) on which there is public and non-public content.

One idea would be to build a kind of mirror marketing area, possibly via custom logic, which always synchronizes the subscriptions between the real and the fake one.
So permission and subscription take place on the real MA. This information is then copied into the Shadow MA and this is where the mailing is created and sent. The logic then copies the unsubscriptions from the Shadow MA back to the real one. Only selected people then receive access to this second marketing area.

entry.title: Database creation based on one SAP B1 Hana Database
entry.content:
In SAP B1 Version 10 with SQL Server, We can create new database using Solution manager through which we can copy UDF,UDT, SP, Master data etc to new target db.

Can anyone suggest weather solution manager available in SAP B1 Ver 10 for Hana? 

If not then which tool we can use to create new SAP B1 Hana database based on existing.

entry.title: Re: Missing profitability Segment in Billing Doc.
entry.content: Please do the settlement of WBS to PSG segment then only COPA document will be generated

entry.title: Re: Internal order in S4HANA Public Cloud 3SL
entry.content: Hi Marco,

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hello,

just a 2 minute test:

With RFC connection the query on virtual table (a database object generated by application object Remote Table):

For a static filter the pushdown happens so the filter is executed on source system side.

For a calculated value in filter condition pushdown do not work!! (for example "take the current period")

Instead for a HANA Connection, calculation in filter condition is pushed down.

So the only way to make a pushdown to some CDS View is through a Datasphere view that do some sort parameter mapping with the CDS View (rather than applying a calculated filter).

The reason is RFC that do not support calculated filters and joins (SDI uses adapter in DP Agent, SDA uses the adapter DP Server/ indexserver => they are not the reason).

Basically: Datasphere is a DWH => IF the issue is performance: replicate the data to Datasphere and then do the logic.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Performance OnePager

entry.title: Re: Internal order in S4HANA Public Cloud 3SL
entry.content: Hi Marco, We are working with Public Cloud implementations - and we miss CO Order very strong. Handling of CO Order is MUCH more easy, and perfectly fulfills the funcion cost collector even in bulk. However WBS can not used in bulk, makes a lot of unneccessary complexity. Deprecation of this objeck is a WRONG decision.

entry.title: Message no V50R051
entry.content:
Hı everyone,

I get an error during the creation of Stock Transp. Order deliveries, this error V50R051 (BAPI_DELIVERYPROCESSING_EXEC). How can I solve this error?

entry.title: About installation of Solution Manager in archived versions
entry.content:
We are not able to see Solution manager 7.2 JAVA SPS16 stack in Maintenance Planner.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: About installation of Solution Manager in archived ve...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

According to KBA "2771041 - SAP Solution Manager 7.2: Support Package stack levels", versions before Solution Manager 7.2 SP17 have been archived already. For the archived versions, we cannot find the media files in Software Download Center and they are not supported to used Maintenance Planner to calculate a stack xml file. SAP only supports versions which are available currently.
In this case, as your Solution Manager system is in an archived version already, please schedule an upgrade to latest SP level as SAP recommended.

Best regards,
Haterm

entry.title: Re: Real Talk with Katya and Jerome | Artificial Intelligence Track Leads
entry.content: Thanks for this inspiring introduction. Looking forward to the mentioned AI sessions at TechEd, sounds very interesting.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: It just so happens to be it birthday today.

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content:
I would say, there are less blogs with reference. I remembered writing a blog with Lady Gaga reference. Your blog has provided another theory, another perspective and yet another way to do it. I would say, a beautifully crafted blog with a lots of efforts, kudos to that. Enjoyed reading.

Being a technical guy, I will share my experience, previously we had the same issue while working on Telco client. Same 999 issue arose and functionals came running to us (with some RnD done functionally) to get it done programmatically. So the quest began, I came across numerous blogs saying do this, do that but in the end document splitting came to rescue. Currently, it's like: document is being split at some agreed number for instance 940 and so on so forth.

Although, I don't understand FI concepts but yes, I tried doing that BSTAT 'U' thing as well but that made BAPIs to stop and changes were reverted.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI issue HTTP operation failed invoking

entry.title: How could we configure the ServiceNow Open Connector using JWT authentication?
entry.content:
How could we configure the ServiceNow Open Connector using JWT authentication? By default, the authentication is OAuth 2.0. We need some clarification on this. 

Thank you in advance,

BR

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content:
lately it calls

    PERFORM FILL_KKBE(SAPFKKBE)
        TABLES FTAB INT_KKBE  
DATA: BEGIN OF FTAB OCCURS 20,
         FIELD LIKE C-TMSB-FIELD,
         MIN LIKE C-TMSB-MIN,
         MAX LIKE C-TMSB-MAX,
      END OF FTAB.

can't find where type of 'C-TMSB-MAX' and 'C-TMSB-MIN' is defined, but it's char24, is it possible to increase to char40?

entry.title: Re: How To reverse the Stock UPLOADED UNDER /SCWM/ISU
entry.content:
Hi

It is for sap cloud system

see if it works 

SAP note 3442084 - How to reverse initial stock upload for EWM

Symptom

The stock is generated with stock migration or APP Post Goods Movement (APP ID MIGO) into EWM (movement type 561), now the stock needs to be removed.

Resolution

Below options can be implemented according business requirement:

  1. APP Manage Warehouse Document can reverse the goods receipt warehouse task with movement type 562.
  2. Create the physical inventory document and count the stock as "0", post the difference at difference analyzer. Movement type is 711.
  3. Do scrapping with APP Post Goods Issue - Unplanned (APP ID /SCWM/ADGI), select the GI process "Scrapping". Movement type is 711.

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Recorded Employee Time - report

Hi all
Recorded Employee Time - report. How can I add Approver to the report?
Thank you for help.

SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: Request ID in Replication Flows
entry.content:
Hi,

we want to store in a local table (which is the target of a replication flow) a kind of request id (like in BW). With a data flow, I could achieve this with a calculated column. I can set a date time field for the current timestamp (which can differ on each record because the data flow takes time).

I thought about a custom annotation or something similar. Has anyone an idea?

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integra...
entry.content:
I have the impression that you mix up terms, SAP Application Interface Framework provides monitoring and error resolution capabilities within your SAP backend system, either SAP ECC or SAP S/4HANA, and is rather addressed to line of business users to fix business related errors. It's not a central monitor like SAP Cloud ALM and it's not part of SAP Integration Suite. Also not sure about your Fiori pages, I am not aware of such a capability in SAP Process Orchestration, so I guess it's custom. Anyway, AIF supports a Fiori UI, not in ECC but in S/4.

If you are looking for a central monitor to monitor your messages that are processed within SAP Integration Suite and your connected systems, I would say go for SAP Cloud ALM, it supports end to end monitoring across your landscape, it also can read AIF messages and correlate messages within the different components within your landscape to each other to be able to trace messages across your landscape.

For more details about SAP Cloud ALM I would propose to go through the blog posts of my colleague:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/central-monitoring-of-integration-scenarios-using-sap-cloud-alm/ba-p/13536605

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/centralized-health-monitoring-of-sap-cloud-integration-using-sap-cloud-alm/ba-p/13522173

Furthermore, check out this blog post where different monitoring tools are compared:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/monitoring-tools-for-cloud-integration-capability-of-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13516949

Hope this helps

Alex

entry.title: Re: How to extend the default session timeout for a Fiori Application launched in Portal
entry.content: Hi Gregor, I managed to create the plugin that calls its Component.js. I can see in Network tab that this is running successfully, however it doesn't keep the Workzone session open. It doesn't overturn what set up in the Launchpad settings ( 30 minutes max ). Do you know why?. Thanks. Javier

entry.title: Re: How to extend the default session timeout for a Fiori Application launched in Portal
entry.content: Forgot to mention that we are using BTP Foundry, and not Neo

entry.title: Re: System messages contained a warning that PSE certificates were about to expire.
entry.content: Very good writeup. We recently faced this issue and this post helped me to identify the issue and advise my team to resolve it.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Adaptation Project : Controller Method not getting triggered
entry.content: Why " ${PurchaseRequisition} "is used?

entry.title: Deploy CAP Java App to BTP - No authentication method found
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am fallowing tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cap-java-deploy-cf.html#2af0294a-493a-4800-99b5-e2e7e0ecc396 and I am not able to deploy the application due to issue with "bookstore-db-deployer". 

The issue began when with not finding the database. 

The mta had configuration : 

 

  - name: bookstore-db
    type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
    parameters:
      service: hana
      service-plan: hdi-shared

 

 

After launching it it was not able to find the service correctly since the trial setup db on different service and plan. After I change it to 

 

  - name: bookstore-db
    type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
    parameters:
      service: hana-cloud-trial
      service-plan: hana​

 

It started launched but had issue with "bookstore-db-deployer". After inspecting the logs I found those: 

 

Not a hana service or user-provided service with hana tag (STDOUT, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Using hdb@undefined for connection (STDOUT, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Detection of server version failed; root cause: No authentication method found (STDOUT, APP/TASK/deploy)#

 

I have my db to allow connections from all ip addresses I tried to recreate the DB but nothing help. 

I am not sure what part of the setup is wrong since the does not say much.

entry.title: Re: Time Calculation Data Action - From To Period
entry.content:
Hi

Your Date type is "DD.MM.YYYY"; unfortunately, it is not supported in Advanced Formulas Date format. Please convert it to "YYYY-MM-DD" or "YYYY.MM.DD" and import it again to the Property value. 

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: MASS transaction for Dispute Management
entry.content:
Hi,

For question 1. "Create Dispute cases and assign dispute reasons".

You can use tx. FDM_AUTO_CREATE (program RFDM3000) for automatic creation of Dispute Cases as per the selection criteria. 

To these cases, a Reason Code can be automatically assigned. Prerequisite is in customizing (DM -> Dispute Case Processing -> Process integration with Accounts Receivale Accounting -> Define Default Values) to have configured for the c.code / Case Type F_DM, the required defaulting Reason Code.

Question 2 already answered.

Hope this helps,

Georgiosc

entry.title: Re: Internal behaviour of dump marker and rsync marker in...
entry.content:
Hi Tony,

In WSB(search Figure 12-4 in the attached) to resync the standby every time we drop and add the standby connection to the Replication Server with dump marker. After this 'enable replication marker' will be written first into the active's transaction log and dump marker when a dump database is executed. Please help me in clarifying the below.

Questions:

1. In MSA while we do resync using dump marker option in define subscription, will 'enable replication marker' gets logged in the PDB's transaction log or not? If logged the behaviour in MSA will be same as WSB ?
2. If we forget to purge the data in the outbound queue of the RDB before we synchronize it, how Replication Server will come to know the transactions in the OBQ can be discarded as they are going to come via dump?

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Re: MASS transaction for Dispute Management
entry.content: Just as further clarification on Question 2. "Update Dispute reasons for currently opened Dispute Cases":

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @meenakshi_si , I wonder how do you maintain "NICKNAME" today? If not EC, you can  maintain "Display Name" as the same how you maintain "NICKNAME".

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ERROR WHEN LOADING AN ACCOUNTING ENTRY WITH EXCEL TEM...
entry.content:
Hello Ismael,

Please refer to the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3286434 for the following errors:

'The value '' of the field 'Credit Amount *' is invalid.'

'The value '' of the field 'Debit Amount *' is invalid.'

For the errors related to Profit Center and Cost Centers, kindly check if there are any blank spaces. After removing the spaces and leaving the cells empty, the file can be imported successfully.

Kindly download a new Journal Entry Voucher template and manually enter the details by typing them in (avoid copying and pasting).

Best Regards,

Prathibha

entry.title: Re: BAPI or FM for deleting a record from the table
entry.content:
Hi Simha 

Is there any BAPI for delete (STMDT) and (STMTI) fields in Table BSET

entry.title: Re: Include direct debit customers in dunning run
entry.content: Hi, meanwhile there's this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3182278 for S/4HANA available. The solution with BTE process 00001060 is the same as in the older note.

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio Code - Issues to access standard librar...
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for your answer and link to your app.

It works today, without any modifications in yaml file. It seems there was proxy issues (curl on library returned error 401), but nobody can told me what has been done or not.

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content:
@bill_froelichi tried to spent some time to undestand.

Unfortunately I can't find what I need. Upload Category permit to add only the Categories to Upload but, I do not found a way to Upload a Category only for a particular Key.

Example: Upload Category "Head" only for requests with Key OrderID "L1235"

entry.title: Re: ERROR WHEN LOADING AN ACCOUNTING ENTRY WITH EXCEL TEM...
entry.content: Hi Prathibha. Agreed. I will take into account what you say. Thank you for your response and for your help. Regards, Ismael.

entry.title: Re: MASS transaction for Dispute Management
entry.content: In transaction SCASE, select in "Case Search" the Disputed Cases to update, and then update the "Reason" in Mass mode using the "Change Field Content" button in the tool bar. Prerequisite is in the configuration to have added the "Reason" field as a "Modifiable Field" (Dispute Case Processing ->Case Search -> Create Profile for Case Search).

entry.title: Let's ask for a change in the "draw signature" component
entry.content:
Dear colleagues
I am asking you to support this feature request: change the style of the draw signature box and/or permit us to style it. I wrote an email to buildapps@sap.com and they need at least 10 users to consider this request. If you agree, please send an email as well. This is what I wrote:
The problem is that the "Draw signature" component can't be styled. In the Android version, above all, this is an issue if you consider that the box to sign has no style: white colour and white background, no border and it's tiny. What I would like to ask is:
- assigning to the component at least a thin border, full page width and height and a light grey background
- giving some style properties to the draw signature component, to change the dimensions, the colour, the border and the background

Thank you very much

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Private Edition EWM/TM Upgrade
entry.content:
Upgrade Campaign

The mainstream and extended maintenance for S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition systems on versions 1610, 1709, 1809, 1909 and 2020 is ending at the end of December 2025. I want to highlight the importance of upgrading to the latest version SAP S/4HANA Extended Warehouse Management and Transportation Management. In this blog I'll be covering the following topics:

  • Why should you upgrade?
  • Technical upgrade vs functional upgrade
  • The upgrade process

 

Why should you upgrade?
  • Upgrading to the latest version of SAP S/4HANA ensures that you have the latest security patches and updates, protecting your data and systems from potential security threats.
  • Upgrading to the latest version means gaining access to the latest innovations and functionality that can improve productivity, efficiency, and overall user experience.
  • Upgrading will avoid going into extended maintenance at an additional fee.
  • Taking advantage of the latest integrations such as Advanced Shipping and Receiving. 

More information can be found in note 52505.

The dates for the end of mainstream maintenance (and extended maintenance, if provided) are published on the SAP customer support website at https://support.sap.com/releasestrategy and in the Product Availability Matrix at https://support.sap.com/pam.

If your organisation is on SAP S/4HANA 2022 or below, you should consider upgrading soon.

Technical upgrade vs Functional upgrade

 

A technical upgrade will keep your software compliant with an improvement of the infrastructure, systems, and technology. This type of upgrade focuses on enhancing performance, security, compatibility and scalability without adding new features or changing the functionality of SAP S/4HANA Extended Warehouse Management or SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management. 

A "functional" upgrade will unlock many new capabilities, improve user experience and address many business requirements, for example - custom code could have been developed for a Goods Receipt Reversal, this functionality is now available in SAP S/4HANA 2023. Note 2178045

The upgrade process

Please consult your software partner and IT department to define a plan for the upgrade. Generally, a customer will upgrade following the steps below:

  • Upgrade Development
  • Test in Development
  • System copy from Production to Quality
  • Upgrade Quality
  • Test in Quality
  • Upgrade Production

Regular upgrades can documented and put into a template, reducing the upgrade project timeline.  If your system is not yet live, it is a great time to upgrade as the testing can be incorporated into the implementation project. 

In conclusion, the value of upgrading SAP S/4HANA cannot be overstated, It ensures that you have access to the latest innovations and security updates which can improve the overall performance and reliability of your system. Additionally, performing a functional upgrade can enhance productivity automate processes  that can give your business a competitive edge as well as possibly reducing custom code. Therefore, investing in regular software upgrades is essential for staying up to date and ensuring the long-term success of your business.

 
In my next blog I plan to highlight the benefits of having a connected Logistics platform. Thank you for reading my blog, please share your feedback in the comments section.

For more updates on SAP Extended Warehouse Management please visit

https://community.sap.com/topics/extended-warehouse-management

If you have any questions on Extended Warehouse Management please visit https://answers.sap.com/index.html 

For more updates on Transportation Management please visit  https://community.sap.com/topics/transportation-management

If you have any questions on Transportation Management please visit https://answers.sap.com/tags/01200615320800000686

Community ravinelala25


#SAPDLROCKS

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi Harvey,

Thanks for your response.

We have ECC so nickname is coming from there...

Is there a way we can change the name format to display as "Nickname" on the Employee Profile.

What's the purpose of activating 'Enable adoption of General Display Name' for non-EC customers? When we can achieve the result by uploading into DISPLAYNAME.  

Thanks,

Meenakshi

entry.title: Re: 公有云下，供应商收不到采购邮件
entry.content: In that case please raise an incident with SAP in the Purchasing component and request them to change the component to what you have mentioned.

entry.title: Re: ZMM_MISSMATCH_PUR
entry.content:
Hi Sarvan 

ZMM_MISSMATCH_PUR is a developed report. No body can tell you how it was implemented or what is the logic of it  except the person who implemented or your abap team. 

To get logic of this report, you need to get Functional spec and Technical spec and review it. if you dont have them  take help from abap consultant , he will tell you the logic

Regards

Rashid khan

entry.title: Re: Read TABLE IRESBD Unicode Problem
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

I'm too facing the same issue . Can you please suggest what to write instead of READ TABLE IRESBD COMPARING VORNR?. here IRESBD is of type RESBD.

entry.title: Re: Unicode error: IRESBD contains components of type X
entry.content:
Hi

I too have the same issue . Can you please let me know how did you fix this? what exactly you write in code to fix it.

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content:
Internal table FTAB

  • Is defined in include FGSB0D00 and uses structure RGSMH.
  • Is filled witch call of form E15_FIND_SELECT_RANGES of report SAPFGRWS.

In my S/4HANA its already 40 (as for KKBE-MATNR) what's your version, did you look for OSS notes (look for data element SETVALMIN/MAX or KKB_MATNR 18->40)

entry.title: Change Item category via badi crm_orderadm_i_badi
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I'm using a badi crm_orderadm_i_badi implemenattion in order to change the item category for an item .I'm currently facing an error CRM_ORDERADM_I 517 "You can only choose one item category from category &1" which is triggered in the form   determine_object_type (LCRM_ORDERADM_I_OWF10)

I'm attempting to change the item category X1 from one area BUS2000155 "Provider Order" to another item category  X2 with area BUS2000140 "CRM Service Product Item ".

Is there any option to fulfill this type of item category change from one area to another ?

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: Add response headers in SAP CAP
entry.content: Hi, could you give example for java using CdsReadEventContext

entry.title: Back can't be used as a parameter name
entry.content:
Try this little report.
 
REPORT.
 
PARAMETERS back.
 
 
Syntactically incorrect!
 
Incorrect nesting: For the statement "ENDMODULE", there is no open structure introduced by "MODULE".  
Module %_BACK is already defined as a INPUT module.  
 
 
I've never seen this before. Seems we can't use back as a parameter name.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Alma is waiting for the next day of the Devtoberfest 🕑

entry.title: Re: Error in select of TMCNV.
entry.content:
Wow, seriously old ABAP.

Remove the tables statement and try

SELECT SINGLE * FROM TMCNV INTO @DATA(my_workarea).

It could be a conversion exit on MASKE. Try checking the domain it's defined on.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Our dog Banjer (name means wanderer in English) is a resqued dog. We adopted him via resque foundation Le Woef in Utrecht (The Netherlands) during COVID. Banjer is has herdering capabilities, this means he likes training. Every weekend we plan something, currently we are doing our third retrieval course and agility is planned. He also loves to lie down on his own couch and check my work progress. 

Banjer guarding my workspace

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Setting SOAP Fault Messages for a SOAP based Sender Channel
entry.content:

I am not sure what you mean here. All pictures here are based on my example.

Best Regards,

 

Jörg

entry.title: Re: Minimum Pay/Wage concept in SuccessFactors Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hi @NaveenR - I am not sure if a recursive way is possible. But perhaps you need a series of time valuatiions which checks these increments (like how we do lookup of seniority for all ranges), you need a time valuation for each such possible range or increment. This can get humungous

The other alternative is to check if you can have this covered using business rules in time val using multiple if else and ranges. I have not explored the business rules yet for this purpose but you can give it a try

entry.title: Re: G/L account 2298841 where the balance of $2,811.63 st...
entry.content:
Hi Vishal,

Please find the following details.

what type of GLis this - Balance Sheet Account

why is there a balance - No Answer.

did you checked the entries via FBL3N? - Yes

whether this GL is open item managed? - No

Additionally , Debit GL Account description is Shipped Not Billed - Returns (Balance Sheet account) and credit G/L account 2298841 is Inv Clearing NON SAP to SAP via Misc GR.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Massive Posting in ZFIM12160 (F28) and Macros
entry.content: ZFIM is a custom developed transaction. No one here has access to your system so you can't get any help.

types of 'C-TMSB-MAX' and 'C-TMSB-MIN' are char24,

entry.title: Peak Memory usage SAP HANA in HANA Studio
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

PFA, We have 512GB License Memory in HANA Studio, But Peak memory usage reached upto 399GB, It's not crossed more than 399GB, Due to that, when peak memory reached 399GB the DATA BASE get disconnected. Clients are getting very suffer to work on peak times every day. Kindly give the solution ASAP. Please take it as *HIGH PRIORITY ISSUE*

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Third Party Licences costs with using T&E Contract type do not trigger EBRR
entry.content:
Hello @former_member599308 

Hope you're doing well, could you please share how did you resolve your requirement.

We have same issue, want to manage third party process using T&E contrat.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Print preview function is greyed out in Change Journal Entries app screen on Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hi Fujita,

If you use Manage Journal Entries (New Version) (App ID: F0717A), you can open a print preview through the Create Correspondence button. Select a journal entry in the list, then choose Create Correspondence. The button is also available on the journal entry detail screen. 

Kind regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Formatting between SuccessFactors Recruiting and DocuSign
entry.content: Did you manage to get an answer to this as we are having similar issues?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi team! I'm glad to have opportunity to join this group.

entry.title: Re: OData services not available in VSCODE
entry.content:
Update: It's a bug in the generator. Interestingly updating the fiori tools does not install the latest version.
Solution is to install the latest version manually via npm install -g @sap/generator-fiori. Before maybe you will have to update node.

entry.title: SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, how to include payment document type DZ in exposure calculation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP ECC AR, tcode F.31, can you please tell how to include payment document type DZ (customer payment or any other document type) in exposure calculation (It's a specific business requirement). I did not find any configuration step allowing this.

It may seems strange to include customer payment in exposure but it's a reel business requirement related to factoring ( you'are paied by bank and then bank will be paied by the reel customer)

Regards

entry.title: Re: Error "Month 00 is not plausible" while accessing payslip in Portal
entry.content: any suggestions for this issue?

entry.title: Scheduling Stories - Dynamic Time Filters Issue
entry.content:
We would like to be able to use dynamic time filters in Stories for running and scheduling reports - but they are not in line with currently available scheduling filters.

Filters like "Previous Month" work fine when we run the reports, but they fail when we schedule them, because the As of Date options for Time Filters in scheduling allow only for a calendar date - so when we schedule a report as of August 1st, the Previous Month dynamic filter always shows July, no matter whether the schedule runs in August or September.

Will it be possible to schedule Stories with dynamic as of date filter? At least to schedule them as of Today?

Aga Czoska, Kennametal

entry.title: Re: ACTION REQUIRED: SAP OEM Partner Agreement Response
entry.content: Any news on this, has anyone taken over the job?

entry.title: How to set environment variables without overwriting existing values with MTA in BTP (CF)?
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

TLDR: How can I set an environment variable with my MTA without overwriting the variables value if it already exists?

Context: We use the Telemetry Plugin in our CAP application. This way we can monitor our application with the Cloud Logging service in BTP.

We do not want to enable telemetry for all our systems. In order to disable the telemetry plugin in a system, NO_TELEMETRY has to be true. In BTP, this has to be done in the "User-provided Variables" in the CF application. 

I set the "User-provided variable" in our MTA config as explained here, with:

 

...
modules:
  - name: app-name
  ...
  properties:
    NO_TELEMETRY: "true"
...

 

 It does what it should and sets the variable for the app in BTP. 

The problem now is that I do not want to overwrite existing values. When I enable the telemetry plugin for an app by manually changing NO_TELEMETRY to false, I don't want the next deployment to overwrite and reset the value to true.

Does anyone know how I can achieve this?

Thanks in advance and best regards.

Robin
